source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/06. Usability 보완_250103/05. 주요 부품 인증서 + 사양서/60-2230C/ASNZS_60-SIPT_60-2230C/ASNZS DFS Client - 60-SIPT_60-2230C - AD740701-03.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: AS/NZS DFS test report AD740701-03 for Laird 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module model ST60-2230C and related models.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory evidence that the tested sample was evaluated for DFS requirements under AS/NZS 4268:2017, with channel shutdown and non-occupancy period results marked Pass.
keyPoints: International Certification Corp. declared the tested sample evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of AS/NZS 4268:2017.
Model ST60-2230C was selected as the representative model for final test and only its data was recorded.
The EUT operating mode at DFS band was client without ad hoc and radar detection function.
Summary of test results lists Channel shutdown and Non-occupancy period as Pass.
Channel shutdown result was Complied, with measured channel closing transmission times within 1 second and channel move times within 10 seconds.

entities.name: International Certification Corp.
entities.evidence: We, International Certification Corp., would like to declare that the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards.

entities.name: ST60-SIPT
entities.evidence: Brand Name Model Name Product Name Description Laird ST60-SIPT 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module SIPT only

entities.name: SU60-2230C
entities.evidence: ST60-2230C 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n M.2 2230 + Bluetooth 4.2 module with carrier board SU60-2230C

concepts.name: Channel Shutdown
concepts.evidence: Channel shutdown Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

concepts.name: Non-occupancy period
concepts.evidence: Non-occupancy period Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

concepts.name: Client without radar detection function
concepts.evidence: Operating Mode at DFS Band Client without ad hoc and radar detection function

concepts.name: Channel Availability Check Time
concepts.evidence: Channel Availability Check Time 60 seconds (see note 1)

concepts.name: Off-Channel CAC
concepts.evidence: Minimum Off-Channel CAC Time 6 minutes (see note 2)

evidence.claim: The report is AS/NZS DFS Test Report number AD740701-03, revision Rev. 01.
evidence.evidenceText: Report No.: AD740701-03 Page : 1 of 15 Report Version: Rev. 01 AS/NZS DFS Test Report

evidence.claim: The issued date for Rev. 01 was Jul. 09, 2018.
evidence.evidenceText: Release Record Report No. Version Description Issued Date AD740701-03 Rev. 01 Initial issue Jul. 09, 2018

evidence.claim: The equipment is an 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module.
evidence.evidenceText: Equipment : 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module

evidence.claim: The model number on the report cover is ST60-2230C.
evidence.evidenceText: Model No. : ST60-2230C

evidence.claim: The applicant is Laird Technologies at W66N220 Commerce Court, Cedarburg, Wisconsin 53012, USA.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicant : Laird Technologies Address : W66N220 Commerce Court, Cedarburg, Wisconsin 53012, USA

evidence.claim: The cited standard on the cover is AS/NZS 4268:2017.
evidence.evidenceText: Standard : AS/NZS 4268:2017

evidence.claim: The sample was received Apr. 07, 2017 and tested Apr. 27, 2017.
evidence.evidenceText: Received Date : Apr. 07, 2017 Tested Date : Apr. 27, 2017

evidence.claim: International Certification Corp. declared the tested sample evaluated and in compliance with the above standard requirements.
evidence.evidenceText: We, International Certification Corp., would like to declare that the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards.

evidence.claim: The summary test results mark Channel shutdown and Non-occupancy period as Pass.
evidence.evidenceText: Channel shutdown Meet the requirement of limit. Pass Non-occupancy period Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: The product details list models ST60-SIPT, SU60-SIPT, ST60-2230C, and SU60-2230C.
evidence.evidenceText: The following models are provided to this EUT. Brand Name Model Name Product Name Description Laird ST60-SIPT ... SU60-SIPT ST60-2230C ... SU60-2230C

evidence.claim: ST60-2230C was selected as the representative model for final test and only its data was recorded.
evidence.evidenceText: The above models, model ST60-2230C was selected as a representative one for the final test and only its data was recorded in this report.

evidence.claim: The EUT frequency ranges were 5.15-5.25, 5.25-5.35, and 5.47-5.725 GHz.
The wireless functions listed were 11a, HT20, HT40, VHT20, VHT40, and VHT80.
evidence.evidenceText: Wireless Function 11a / HT20 / HT40 / VHT20 / VHT40 / VHT80

evidence.claim: The DFS band operating mode was client without ad hoc and radar detection function.
evidence.evidenceText: Operating Mode at DFS Band Client without ad hoc and radar detection function

evidence.claim: The firmware/software version was SD-UAPSTA-8997-U14-MMC-16.68.1.p95-C3X16219_V4-MGPL-src.
evidence.evidenceText: Firmware / Software Version SD-UAPSTA-8997-U14-MMC-16.68.1.p95-C3X16219_V4-MGPL-src

evidence.claim: DFS requirement values include Channel Availability Check Time 60 seconds, Channel Move Time 10 seconds, Channel Closing Transmission Time 1 second, and Non-occupancy period minimum 30 minutes.
evidence.evidenceText: Channel Availability Check Time 60 seconds ... Channel Move Time 10 seconds Channel Closing Transmission Time 1 second. Non-occupancy period Minimum 30 minutes

evidence.claim: For channels within 5600 MHz to 5650 MHz, Channel Availability Check Time is 10 minutes.
evidence.evidenceText: For channels whose nominal bandwidth falls completely or partly within the band 5600 MHz to 5650 MHz, the Channel Availability Check Time shall be 10 minutes.

evidence.claim: Slave devices with maximum e.i.r.p. less than 23 dBm do not have to implement radar detection unless used in fixed outdoor point-to-point or multipoint applications.
evidence.evidenceText: Slave devices with a maximum e.i.r.p. of less than 23 dBm do not have to implement radar detection unless these devices are used in fixed outdoor point to point or fixed outdoor point to multipoint applications

evidence.claim: The DFS technical requirements table states Channel Shutdown applies to Master, Slave without radar detection, and Slave with radar detection modes.
evidence.evidenceText: Channel Shutdown   

evidence.claim: The DFS threshold level stated in the report was -64 dBm.
evidence.evidenceText: DFS Threshold level: -64 dBm

evidence.claim: The channel shutdown result was Complied.
evidence.evidenceText: Channel Shutdown Result ... Limit 1 sec 10 sec Result Complied

evidence.claim: Measured channel shutdown cases included 11a at 5320 MHz and 5500 MHz, and VHT80 at 5290 MHz and 5530 MHz, using table D.3 radar test signal.
The test site was DF01-WS and testing condition for DFS was 23°C / 68% by Jack Li.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Item Test Site Ambient Condition Tested By DFS DF01-WS 23°C / 68% Jack Li

evidence.claim: The test laboratory information identifies International Certification Corp. as EMC and Wireless Communication Laboratory with test sites in Linkou District and Kwei Shan District.
evidence.evidenceText: International Certification Corp (EMC and Wireless Communication Laboratory) ... Our Test sites are located at Linkou District and Kwei Shan District.

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit regulator or issuing authority is identified; authorityOrJurisdiction is inferred only from AS/NZS wording and standards cited in the report.
The report covers multiple listed models, but states ST60-2230C was the representative model and only its data was recorded.
The source includes minor OCR or text extraction artifacts such as special symbols in tables, but key metadata and results are readable.
